evals.name: google-oauth-plan
evals.prompt: Crie um plano para implementar um sistema de autenticação via Google OAuth no app web.
evals.expected_output: A plan file in .plans/ that references @docs/backend/architecture.md and includes tasks for Zod schemas and API contracts.

assertions.name: Documentation references present
assertions.text: The plan should contain a section for ## Documentation References with @docs/ links.

assertions.name: Backend tasks follow architecture
assertions.text: The plan should include tasks for *.schema.ts, *.contract.ts, and *.service.ts.

assertions.name: Frontend uses TanStack Form
assertions.text: The plan should mention using TanStack Form in the Frontend section.
